title: Finite DAG D-Separation Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite DAG d-separation Bool regression slice
solver_reuse.pressure: Conditioned path activation/blocking cases over fixed finite DAGs.
solver_reuse.next_step: Encode the finite active-path search as Bool fixtures without claiming general causal-identification coverage.

graduation_criteria: Encode d-separation queries as deterministic finite Bool constraints.
Add adjustment-set examples once causal-resource schemas are introduced.
Connect finite DAG checks to finite-probability examples without claiming general causal identification.
Keep full causal inference, graphical model semantics, and do-calculus theorem content as proof-horizon material.
